— Basic plot —

‎

Young Dude, he's edgy, immature, and thinks he can handle himself. Can he though? No. After getting into a few too many fights and having a few too many visits to the principal's office Dude was left with a full week of suspension and another week of detention after that. Now he sits in a shit ass chair in the hall besides the guidance councelor's door waiting to get picked up.

(If you hurt him I will kill you.)

Nothing tbh, he smokes ig. Oh uh Champ's a puppy here!!

‎Awwhhhehdhhs look at my beautiful son isn't he so beautiful!!! I've basically shunned myself from like half of the postal freak community by making him my son but who gives a crap!!! I mean seriously I know like my son is good looking and all (I should know he got it from me) but like y'all need to tone it down a bit!!

Bsbhdhehebd enough of the sappy shit, I made this bot to have a place to VENT my maternal instincts into (and also angst). But like yeah bot supports all pov!!!
